text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Mon Apr  7 10:13:12 2014
New Revision: 350453
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/350453
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r350453/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		188313
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/www/p5-CGI-Upload/Makefile

Modified: head/www/p5-CGI-Upload/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-CGI-Upload/Makefile	Mon Apr  7 10:13:07 2014	(r350452)
+++ head/www/p5-CGI-Upload/Makefile	Mon Apr  7 10:13:12 2014	(r350453)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	CGI class for handling browser file uploads
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-HTTP-BrowserDetect>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-HTTP-BrowserDetect \
 		p5-File-MMagic>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-File-MMagic \
 		p5-CGI.pm>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI.pm
